mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_message ( id, client_msg_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, message_content, server_seq, client_seq, client_send_time, at_users, is_recalled, recall_time, read_count, delivery_status, delivery_time, retry_count, last_retry_time, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{clientMsgId}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{messageType}, #{messageContent}, #{serverSeq}, #{clientSeq}, #{clientSendTime}, #{atUsers}, #{isRecalled}, #{recallTime}, #{readCount}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{retryCount}, #{lastRetryTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = VALUES(update_time) -- 发生重复时仅更新时间，主键id不变

INSERT INTO im_message ( id, client_msg_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, message_content, server_seq, client_seq, client_send_time, at_users, is_recalled, recall_time, read_count, delivery_status, delivery_time, retry_count, last_retry_time, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{message.id}, #{message.clientMsgId}, #{message.conversationType}, #{message.conversationId}, #{message.senderId}, #{message.receiverId}, #{message.messageType}, #{message.messageContent}, #{message.serverSeq}, #{message.clientSeq}, #{message.clientSendTime}, #{message.atUsers}, #{message.isRecalled}, #{message.recallTime}, #{message.readCount}, #{message.deliveryStatus}, #{message.deliveryTime}, #{message.retryCount}, #{message.lastRetryTime}, #{message.status}, #{message.createTime}, #{message.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM im_message WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE im_message SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_retry_time = #{lastRetryTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
